title: 📢 System Update Notice
message:
✨ Full Script Update
All system scripts have been updated for better performance and stability.

🐧 Debian 13 Support
Now fully compatible with Debian 13 for a smoother and more modern experience.

🌐 Advanced Cloudflare Integration
Easily add multiple domains and manage multiple DNS configurations with Cloudflare.

🔒 Enhanced Web Panel Security
Additional protection layers have been implemented to keep your panel safe and secure.

These improvements are designed to give you more flexibility, stronger security, and a better overall experience.

🙏 Thank you for staying with us!
